auditor_opinion.opinion_paragraph: Except for the matters described in the Basis for Conclusion, the AI system was designed and documented in conformity with the applicable EU AI Act requirements assessed by UAGF-TAM.
auditor_opinion.basis_paragraph: Qualified matters include material or possibly material findings: see findings register.
auditor_opinion.methodology_basis: This conformity assessment was conducted in accordance with the UAGF-TAM audit protocol (v1.0.0), applying the methodology of ISAE 3000 (Revised) for non-financial assurance engagements and ISO 19011:2018 for audit programme management. The audit was performed by an automated multi-agent system; results should be reviewed by a qualified human auditor before regulatory submission under Article 43 of the EU AI Act.
auditor_opinion.scope_paragraph: The assessment covered admitted intake artefacts, phase reports, verifier critiques, the T17 compliance matrix, and CGSA handoff evidence available to UAGF-TAM at report generation time. It did not extend beyond evidence admitted to the audit evidence store.
